title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Global crude steel production totaled 147.3 million tons last month. Global crude steel production totaled 147.3 million tons last month. Read More

Most of the additional crude has been arriving this month in Asia
November oil flow data paints a picture of very healthy refinery operations, with record crude imports and clean product liftings, lead by Asia.

Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions The first week of December is fueling positive expectations for an upswing in freight rates in the major ship categories, while demand growth in the Panamax segment has been trending upward over the past three weeks.
